title: Trifolium macropodum
taxonomy: Trifolium macropodum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is a member of the genus Trifolium, which includes various types of clover. The plant is native to parts of the world, including Australia, and is typically found in grasslands and open woodlands. Trifolium macropodum is considered a shrubby perennial or subshrub, with small white or pink flowers. Its classification also places it in the order Fabales and the kingdom Plantae.
